title: senecio regis
intro: Senecio regis, also known as Groundsel Tree or Buttercup Bush, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and aromatic foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio regis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
